title: Skirmish near Borleias

A brief '''conflict''' occurred between a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] patrol and a scouting force sent by [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], one month after the New Republic [[Second Battle of Borleias|captured]] [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].

The [[Dwarf Star-class freighter|''Dwarf Star''-class freighter]] ''[[Vengeance Derra IV]]'', a Zsinj-aligned ship named according to New Republic conventions in order to facilitate covert missions, arrived unannounced in the [[Pyria system]], to verify the New Republic's reported conquest of Borleias. At that time, only an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Champion Squadron]] were on patrol. Though the arrival of the ''Vengeance Derra IV'' seemed like an ordinary event, Rogue pilot [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] was immediately suspicious and ordered the Y-wings to take a closer look. These suspicions were not alleviated when the freighter only provided the proper coded response to the Y-wings' challenge on its second try. When Corran ordered the ''Vengeance Derra IV'' to stop for inspection, it instead opened its cargo bay to release four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and two [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]]. The Y-wing pilots shot down one bomber and disabled the other with their [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], then knocked out the freighter's [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] salvos. Horn shot down three TIE fighters, and the fourth was destroyed by another proton torpedo from one of the Y-wings. With its fighters eliminated, the ''Vengeance Derra IV'' escaped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], only to pursued by Rogue Squadron and defeated over [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]].
